name: craft
description: Build desktop apps with web languages, powered by Zig
author: Chris Breuer <chris@stacksjs.org>

scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:sdk
scripts.build:core: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe -Dversion=$(bun -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")
scripts.build:debug: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig build
scripts.build:mobile: bun run build:ios && bun run build:android
scripts.build:web: bun run build:sdk && bun run build:react && bun run build:vue && bun run build:svelte
scripts.build:all: bun run build:core && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:ios && bun run build:android && bun run build:react && bun run build:vue && bun run build:svelte
scripts.test: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig build test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/typescript && bun run typecheck && cd ../create-craft && bun run typecheck && cd ../ts-maps && bun run typecheck
scripts.run: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig build run
scripts.run:demo: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig build run-demo
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/zig/zig-cache packages/zig/zig-out && bun run clean:packages
scripts.fmt: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig fmt src/ build.zig
scripts.fmt:check: eval "$(pantry env | sed -n '/^export /,$p')" && cd packages/zig && zig fmt --check src/ build.zig
scripts.release: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bun x --bun bumpx prompt --recursive
scripts.release:patch: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bun x --bun bumpx patch --recursive --yes
